indication: OPDIVO (nivolumab), in combination with fluoropyrimidine- and platinum-containing chemotherapy, is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with HER2 negative advanced or metastatic gastric, gastroesophageal junction or esophageal adenocarcinoma.
description: Health Canada approved nivolumab in combination with fluoropyrimidine- and platinum-containing chemotherapy, for the treatment of adult patients with HER2 negative advanced or metastatic gastric, gastroesophageal junction or esophageal adenocarcinoma.
raw_cancer_type: negative advanced or metastatic gastric, gastroesophageal junction or esophageal adenocarcinoma

document.name: Opdivo (nivolumab) [product monograph]. HC.
